title: Elbaf’s Children Are in Danger
description: On pages 4–6, this part follows Unknown person #4, Scopper Gaban, Dorry, Usopp, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #1 as Elbaf’s school, underworld, and giant society fall into crisis as children, giants, and the Straw Hats react to dangerous forces moving beneath the island.
scene: Elbaf’s school, underworld, and giant society fall into crisis as children, giants, and the Straw Hats react to dangerous forces moving beneath the island.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The problem is... Who Do We bargain with once we have these brats as bait?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: (RACK (FACK...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You're right, high one!!

dialogue.speaker: Scopper Gaban
dialogue.text: Damn... this hurts, Gaban, you jerk!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The idea of a land with- out a King is absolutely insane!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Huff... huff...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I Command Tree To Seize This Coun- Try...

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Blue oni Dorry and red oni Brogy!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ye shall become the kings of this land!!!

dialogue.text: You're one of the God's knights?!

dialogue.text: You're the one...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Behind all this chaos in our Elbaf!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Move out, men!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Yes, boss!!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Watch it, Brogy!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're tak- ing the kids back!! How many of you are there?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Harken, Brogy... Thou shalt now go and confront Jarul "Beaded Mountain".

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: off with his head, and bear it aloft.

dialogue.text: Then, before all, proclaim:

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1

dialogue.text: Shut it!! You're not the one...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Who de- Cides our country's fate!!

dialogue.text: AAAAR- GH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Crisis through 26 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
